name: Cantaloupe Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred fine or puree half the cantaloupe (or enough to make 1 cup pulp). Place in the top of a small double boiler.
2. Soften gelatin in 3/4 cup hot water. Stir in slightly beaten egg yolks, 1/4 cup sugar, and salt until combined.
3. Cook over boiling water, stirring constantly, until thickened. Remove from heat and add lemon juice. Allow to cool.
4. Cut the remaining cantaloupe into small cubes and mix with the cooled mixture.
5. Beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually fold in the remaining 1/4 cup sugar until a stiff (but not dry) meringue forms.
6. Whip the heavy cream until stiff. Gently fold the meringue and half the whipped cream into the cantaloupe mixture.
7. Pour into the prepared baked graham cracker crust. Decorate the top with additional whipped cream.
8. Chill for about 3 hours, then serve on the same day.
